hero.description: Glootty is an interactive educational platform that makes learning fun and engaging for students aged 8-17, while providing powerful tools for teachers to track progress and create personalized learning experiences.

features.title: Why Students & Teachers Love Glootty
features.description: Our platform combines engaging learning experiences with powerful teaching tools to create the perfect educational environment.

gamified.title: Gamified Learning
gamified.description: Turn learning into an adventure with interactive games, challenges, and rewards that make education fun.

collaborative.title: Collaborative Tools
collaborative.description: Work together on projects, share ideas, and learn from peers with our suite of collaborative features.

dashboard.title: Teacher Dashboard
dashboard.description: Track student progress, identify areas for improvement, and manage classroom activities all in one place.

ai.title: AI-Powered Learning
ai.description: Personalized learning materials generated by AI, tailored to each student's unique needs and learning style.

howItWorks.title: How Glootty Works
howItWorks.description: Our platform makes learning simple, engaging, and effective in just a few steps.

steps.title: Create Your Account
steps.description: Sign up as a student or teacher and set up your profile with your interests and learning goals.

steps.title: Discover Learning Paths
steps.description: Browse subjects and topics or take our assessment to get personalized learning recommendations.

steps.title: Engage with Interactive Content
steps.description: Learn through games, quizzes, videos, and collaborative projects that make education fun.

steps.title: Track Your Progress
steps.description: Monitor your achievements, earn rewards, and see your improvement over time with detailed analytics.

steps.title: Connect and Collaborate
steps.description: Work with classmates on group projects and participate in learning communities.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Learning?
cta.description: Join students and teachers already using Glootty to make education more engaging and effective.

footer.tagline: Making education engaging and accessible for students of all ages.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your needs. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

pro.name: Pro / Educator
pro.description: For educators who need full access

freeTier.question: What's included in the free tier?
freeTier.answer: The free tier includes basic features like limited tasks, basic LOR access, and analytics. It's perfect for trying out Glootty and seeing if it fits your needs.

switching.question: Can I switch plans later?
switching.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you'll only be charged the prorated amount for the remainder of your billing cycle.

custom.question: Do you offer custom plans for larger institutions?
custom.answer: Yes, we offer custom enterprise plans for larger institutions with specific needs. Contact our sales team to discuss your requirements.

aboutUs.title: Our Team
aboutUs.subtitle: Students from SMK Dato Penggawa Timur working together to make education better
aboutUs.creatorDescription: Hi! I'm a 16-year-old student with a passion for technology and education. When I'm not coding or exploring new tech, you can find me tinkering with Linux or working on exciting programming projects.

interests.title: What We Love
interests.subtitle: Technologies and topics that drive our passion

programming.title: Programming
programming.description: Passionate about creating software solutions and learning new programming languages to build innovative applications.

computerScience.title: Computer Science
computerScience.description: Fascinated by algorithms, data structures, and the fundamental principles that power modern computing.

linux.title: Linux & Open Source
linux.description: Enthusiastic about Linux operating systems and the open-source community, always exploring new distributions and tools.

school.title: Current Education
school.name: SMK Dato Penggawa Timur
school.description: A proud student focusing on academic excellence while pursuing my passion for technology and computer science.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.description: Fellow students from SMK Dato Penggawa Timur working together to make Glootty better.

tester.title: Quality Assurance
tester.description: Ensuring Glootty works flawlessly through thorough testing and user experience validation.

advisor.title: Product Advisor
advisor.description: Contributing creative ideas and insights to shape Glootty's features and direction.
